TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Zayazayan, title = Zayazayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zayazayan} }

S.FORM: alang Zayazayan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 793 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 768 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 3%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zayazayan hya' ga Masilid. tay 'zil na Zayazayan hya' ga Vecekadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Zayazayan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 793 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 768 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 3%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zayazayan hya' ga Masilid. tay 'zil na Zayazayan hya' ga Vecekadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ zajazajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na zajazajan ħjaʔ ɣa mas~ɕili*. taj ʔzil na zajazajan ħjaʔ ɣa *eʦ~ʨeka*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
